tagline: Ask any question about your health — privately and without judgment.
consent_title: Welcome — let's set up a safe space
consent_illustration_alt: Two young people talking openly about health
consent_body: This is a private, anonymous space to learn about sexual and reproductive health. We don't ask for your name and we don't store who you are. You can stop at any time.
consent_anonymous_confirm: I understand my questions are anonymous
chat_fallback_message: I'm not able to help with that. Please reach out to a trusted health worker.
welcome_prompt: Tap a question below or type your own.
offline_banner: Service temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
landing_title: Real answers about your body, your health, your choices.
landing_who: For young people and persons with disabilities in Rwanda — in Kinyarwanda or English.
landing_reassure: Private and anonymous. This chat shares information, not emergency care — for urgent help it points you to real services like 114.
landing_learn_more: How it works, languages, accessibility & safety
landing_lang_body: Switch between Kinyarwanda and English at any time using the language button at the top of the screen.
landing_subtitle: A free, private space where young people in Rwanda can ask anything about sexual and reproductive health — and get clear, caring answers in Kinyarwanda or English.
landing_what_body: The SRH Education Platform is a friendly chatbot built for teenagers and persons with disabilities in Rwanda. Ask about puberty, relationships, contraception, HIV and other infections, pregnancy, consent, and staying safe — in the language you're most comfortable with.
landing_help_1: Puberty and the changes your body goes through
landing_help_3: HIV and other sexually transmitted infections
landing_help_4: Healthy relationships, consent, and staying safe
landing_help_5: Where to find real-world help near you
landing_private_body: We never ask for your name and we don't store who you are. Your questions are yours alone, and you can stop any time.
landing_safety_body: This chatbot shares information — it is not a doctor or a counsellor. For emergencies or urgent help it will point you to real services, such as Rwanda's health line 114, instead of trying to answer.
landing_how_1: Tap "Start a conversation" and confirm that you are 13 or older and that your chat is anonymous.
landing_how_2: Type your question — or tap one of the ready-made questions if typing is hard.
landing_how_3: Switch between Kinyarwanda and English any time using the language button.
landing_how_4: Open the accessibility menu to make text larger, turn on high contrast, or have answers read aloud.
landing_access_title: Built to be used by everyone
landing_access_body: Read-aloud, larger text, high-contrast colours, and full keyboard support are built in on every screen — including this one.
landing_footer_note: Made for young people in Rwanda. You deserve clear, kind answers.
